query:
-- Buscar cliente Ruth
SELECT id, name, email FROM clients WHERE name LIKE '%Ruth%' OR email LIKE '%ruth%' OR email LIKE '%alvarorios79@gmail%';

-- Buscar cotizaciones de Ruth
SELECT q.id, q.quotationNumber, q.clientId, q.total, q.status, q.createdAt, q.validUntil, c.name as clientName
FROM quotations q
JOIN clients c ON q.clientId = c.id
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Ruth%' OR c.email LIKE '%ruth%' OR c.email LIKE '%alvarorios79@gmail%';

-- Buscar proyectos de Ruth
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.clientId, p.quotationId, p.status, p.createdAt, c.name as clientName
FROM projects p
JOIN clients c ON p.clientId = c.id
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Ruth%' OR c.email LIKE '%ruth%' OR c.email LIKE '%alvarorios79@gmail%';
